name: Armada Acquisition Corp. II
business: Armada Acquisition Corp. II is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger with one or more businesses. It intends to concentrate its efforts on identifying businesses in the FinTech, SaaS and AI industries. As of September 30, 2025, it has not completed any business combination.

exposures.sentence: We disclosed in our Final Prospectus that while we may pursue an initial business combination target in any business or industry, we intended to concentrate our efforts identifying businesses in the FinTech, SaaS and AI industries.

We disclosed in our Final Prospectus that while we may pursue an initial business combination target in any business or industry, we intended to concentrate our efforts identifying businesses in the FinTech, SaaS and AI industries.

catalysts.event: Entered into Business Combination Agreement with PubCo, Armada Merger Sub, Pathfinder, Pathfinder Merger Sub, and Ripple
catalysts.sentence: On October 19, 2025, we entered into the Business Combination Agreement with (a) PubCo, (b) Armada Merger Sub, (c) Pathfinder, (d) Pathfinder Merger Sub, and (e) Ripple.

catalysts.event: Deadline to complete initial business combination, otherwise liquidation
catalysts.sentence: Our amended and restated memorandum and articles of association provides that we must complete our initial business combination within 18 months from the closing of our Initial Public Offering.

tamClaims.claim: Global fintech market valued at $295 billion in 2023, projected to reach $1,152 billion by 2032 at a CAGR of 16.5%
tamClaims.sentence: According to an estimate by Fortune Business Insights, the global fintech market was valued at $295 billion in 2023, and is projected to be worth $340 billion in 2024 and reach $1,152 billion by 2032, exhibiting a CAGR of 16.5% during 2024 and 2032

tamClaims.claim: Global AI market size valued at $274 billion in 2023, projected to grow to $1,229 billion by 2032 at a CAGR of 18.4%
tamClaims.sentence: According to an estimate by Fortune Business Insights, the global AI market size was valued at $274 billion in 2023, and is projected to growth from $318 billion in 2024 to $1,229 billion by 2032, exhibiting a CAGR of 18.4% during the projection period

tamClaims.claim: Global AI market size valued at $515 billion in 2023, projected to grow to $2,740 billion by 2032 at a CAGR of 20.4%
tamClaims.sentence: According to an estimate by Fortune Business Insights, the global AI market size was valued at $515 billion in 2023, and is projected to grow from $621 billion in 2024 to $2,740 billion by 2032, growing at a CAGR of 20.4% during the forecast period
